---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="projects-header">
  <div class="warm-divider"></div>
  <h1>Projects</h1>
  <p style="color:#6b4c35; font-style:italic; font-size:1.05rem; margin-bottom:2rem;">
    A collection of data science work from coursework and beyond.
  </p>
</div>

<div style="max-width:860px; margin:0 auto;">

  <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.6rem; 
              color:#2c2118; margin-bottom:1.2rem;">
    Class Projects
  </h2>

  <!-- SQL PROJECT -->
  <div class="project-card" 
       onclick="window.open('projects/sql-analysis/Project_2_Template (2).html', '_blank')" 
       style="cursor:pointer;">
    <h3>Project 2 — SQL Data Analysis</h3>
    <span class="project-tag">SQL</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Data Wrangling</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Team Project</span>
    <p>
      A collaborative SQL analysis exploring global health spending patterns 
      using relational database queries, joins, and aggregations.
    </p>
    <span class="btn-project">▶ View Project</span>
  </div>

  <!-- TEXT ANALYSIS PROJECT -->
  <div class="project-card" 
       onclick="window.open('projects/text-analysis/Project_3_Template (1).html', '_blank')" 
       style="cursor:pointer;">
    <h3>Project 3 — Text Analysis</h3>
    <span class="project-tag">R</span>
    <span class="project-tag">NLP</span>
    <span class="project-tag">tidytext</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Team Project</span>
    <p>
      A text analysis project exploring patterns, sentiment, and key themes 
      in a jobs dataset using R and natural language processing techniques.
    </p>
    <span class="btn-project">▶ View Project</span>
  </div>

  <!-- RESUME MATCH PROJECT -->
  <div class="project-card" 
       onclick="window.open('projects/resume-match/README.html', '_blank')" 
       style="cursor:pointer;">
    <h3>Project 4 — resumeMatchR</h3>
    <span class="project-tag">R</span>
    <span class="project-tag">R Package</span>
    <span class="project-tag">NLP</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Team Project</span>
    <p>
      An R package that matches resumes to job descriptions using text similarity 
      and natural language processing techniques to help job seekers tailor 
      their applications.
    </p>
    <span class="btn-project">▶ View Project</span>
  </div>

  <!-- STATISTICAL IDEAS POSTER -->
  <div class="project-card" 
       onclick="window.open('projects/statistical-ideas/poster (1).html', '_blank')" 
       style="cursor:pointer;">
    <h3>Eight Statistical Ideas That Shaped the Last 50 Years</h3>
    <span class="project-tag">Statistics</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Data Visualization</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Poster</span>
    <p>
      A visual poster exploring eight landmark statistical ideas from the last 
      50 years and their lasting impact on modern data science and research.
    </p>
    <span class="btn-project">▶ View Poster</span>
  </div>

  <!-- BEYOND CLASS DIVIDER -->
  <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.6rem; 
              color:#2c2118; margin:2.5rem 0 1.2rem 0;">
    Beyond the Classroom
  </h2>

  <!-- INSURANCE ANALYSIS -->
  <div class="project-card" 
       onclick="window.open('projects/insurance-analysis/Exploratory_Analysis.html', '_blank')" 
       style="cursor:pointer;">
    <h3>What Factors Affect Medical Insurance Charges?</h3>
    <span class="project-tag">R</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Exploratory Analysis</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Data Visualization</span>
    <p>
      An exploratory data analysis investigating how factors like smoking status, 
      BMI, sex, and region influence medical insurance charges, using visualizations 
      and summary statistics.
    </p>
    <span class="btn-project">▶ View Project</span>
  </div>

</div>
```
